title: Claude Guillemot, co-founder of Ubisoft, dies in plane crash
summary: One of the five brothers who founded the company died when the aircraft crashed in France.

title: Halo remake on PS5 will require Xbox account and PS Plus for local co-op
summary: Players criticize the abusive requirements for split-screen play, which include double subscription and a Microsoft account.

title: CD Projekt RED trusts The Witcher 4 to overcome the stain of Cyberpunk 2077
summary: The company's CEO points out that they need to complete their redemption arc with the next installment of the saga to regain trust.

title: Bobby Prince, composer of Doom and Duke Nukem, dies at 81
summary: The legendary musician and master of MIDI, responsible for the iconic soundtracks of Doom and Duke Nukem, died at 81.

title: The video game industry reaches a revenue record despite mass layoffs
summary: A report reveals that the global market exceeded $200 billion in 2025 while layoffs continue across several studios.

title: Sony abandons PC and bets on AI in its annual business report
summary: The Japanese company steers its strategy towards artificial intelligence and leaves the PC market in the background.

title: Stellaris celebrates 10 years with a free weekend and 70% discount
summary: The popular space strategy game offers free access over the weekend and a historic discount to commemorate its decade.

title: Dead Space remake is on sale on Steam for just $6
summary: The acclaimed title, considered one of the best video game remakes, can be obtained at a very reduced price for a limited time.

title: Rockstar suffers another legal setback in the GTA 6 case
summary: The legal process against the studio is progressing unfavorably, though not positively for the developers.

title: Slay The Spire 2 receives its second major update and fixes a bug that ruined runs
summary: The roguelike card game releases an important patch that fixes a bug that affected the gameplay experience.

title: Path of Exile 2 director criticizes players who exploited the system to become millionaires
summary: Jonathan Rogers states that these abuses ruined his Christmas and that he has lost all sympathy for those who took advantage.

title: Guild Wars 3 will be more MMO than its predecessor, according to its director
summary: The new title in the franchise will offer a massively multiplayer experience different from Guild Wars 2.

title: Ace Combat 8 shows its first impressions after a long wait
summary: The new air combat simulator is available to try and the feelings confirm that it was worth the wait.

title: Atlus shows Persona 4 Revival gameplay ahead of its 2027 release
summary: The company reveals the first images of the game in motion and confirms its release date for two years from now.

title: Control Resonant is playable and convinces fans of the saga
summary: The new title from the creators of Control offers an experience that maintains the studio's surprising essence.

title: Capcom formed a group of women nicknamed 'Diana Police' to give naturalness to the protagonist of Pragmata
summary: A female team supervised the gestures and behaviors of the young protagonist to avoid caricatures.

title: Brendan Greene reduces his team and seeks funding for his new studio
summary: The creator of PlayerUnknown's Battlegrounds moves forward with a smaller team while his studio struggles to secure funds.

title: Richard Garriott would regain the rights to Ultima from EA next year
summary: The legendary game designer could regain control of the RPG series after decades in Electronic Arts' hands.

title: A former Dragon Age writer warns that AI can make game development frustrating
summary: He is concerned about the elimination of entry-level positions, which prevents training the next generation of developers.

title: Nintendo publishes a Switch 2 video with numerous third-party games
summary: The promotional preview shows several titles from external companies that will arrive on the new console.
